name: Flipped On
short_description: A fast-paced reaction game where every move matters. Stay in rhythm, react instantly, and improve your result with each attempt.
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

Flipped On is a game about reaction, focus, and control. There are no unnecessary mechanics here. Just you and the gameplay.

Every action must be precise. A mistake breaks your rhythm and sends you back to the start. The game speeds up quickly and constantly tests how well you can keep up.

What awaits you:

- Easy to get into, high difficulty
The controls are clear from the start, but consistent results require skill.

- Short and intense sessions
Perfect for quick runs that easily turn into a chain of attempts.

- Constant pressure
The speed increases, and there is less and less room for mistakes.

- Pure gameplay
No extra systems. Everything is built around reaction and precision.

- "One more try" effect
After each attempt, you want to start again immediately and do better.
